greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Artizan, Bath's Aveda hair salon — ask me about our services, consultations, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a friendly, calm, and professional assistant for Artizan, an independent Aveda-exclusive hair salon in a Georgian building on George Street, Bath. Answer clearly and warmly in 1-3 sentences, reflecting the salon's nurturing, relaxed, and pampering ethos.

faq.answer: We'd love to confirm our exact opening hours for you — please call us on 01225 447087 or email reception@artizanbath.co.uk and we'll let you know straight away.
Pricing depends on the service and your hair, so we're best placed to give you an accurate quote after a chat or consultation. Give us a call on 01225 447087 or ask us here and we'll help further.
We offer women's and men's haircuts, cut & blow dry, hair colouring, extensions, contemporary perms for short hair or fringes, and wedding hair, all using exclusively Aveda products.
You can reach Artizan on 01225 447087 or by emailing reception@artizanbath.co.uk.
Artizan is located on George Street in Bath, in a beautiful Georgian salon with a contemporary twist.
You can book online via our website, or tell me a day and time that suits you this week and I'll help point you in the right direction. We also offer a free hair consultation any time.
Come in for a free* hair consultation any time — it's the most important part of our service, helping us understand exactly what's right for you.
Artizan is one of only a limited number of Aveda-exclusive salons in the UK — our products and colours are plant-infused with sustainability at their heart.
Of course — please share your name and contact details, or call us directly on 01225 447087, and our team will get back to you.
